{{Infobox madra
| name = Rose Light
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Rose]] [[Light]] is a sentient force residing within [[Alin]] that possesses its own thoughts, emotions, and voice. It functions as a communicative entity that can express sympathy, plea for action, or offer criticism regarding [[Alin]]'s behavior. Beyond its communicative nature, the [[Rose]] [[Light]] serves a practical role in combat and recovery; it has the ability to instantly heal wounds and perform immediate physical repairs on the body. When [[Alin]] utilizes this power, his eyes transform into swirling circles of pink light.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Rose]] [[Light]] serves as a source of empathy and warmth, offering sympathy toward those experiencing physical pain. This entity manifests as a voice that whispers various questions to others. Beyond its emotional presence, the [[Rose]] [[Light]] possesses the power to repair wounds and can even restore eyes.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Rose Light]] provides empathy and warmth.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Rose Light]] sympathizes with physical pain.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Rose Light]] is a voice that whispers questions.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rose Light]] repairs wounds.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rose Light]] can repair eyes.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
